title: Azure App Service Plans
citation: Microsoft Learn. Azure App Service plans overview. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Infrastructure planning for Azure App Service Plan B1/B2/Premium scale-up path.
claims_supported: Microsoft documents that apps in the same App Service plan share compute resources.
Microsoft documents scale-up from lower tiers to higher tiers when more cores, memory, or storage are needed.
claims_not_supported: That B1 can run heavy 3D generation, LLM inference, ASR, or TTS locally.
That HTTP/3/WebTransport is guaranteed through every Azure App Service deployment path.
